name: Sweden (naval ensign)
description: A swallow-tailed and tongued (tretungad) version of the Swedish flag — a blue field with a yellow Nordic cross — used as the naval ensign and state ensign.
history: The Swedish naval/state ensign (tretungad fana) is a triple-tailed version of the national flag. Used by the Swedish Armed Forces, particularly the Royal Swedish Navy. The current proportions were standardized by the 1906 Swedish Flag Act.

features.symbolism: Christianity and ties to the other Nordic nations
